Name: Cueola Talkback
Description: Momentary push-to-talk routing to output pair A (outs 1-2) or B (outs 3-4) via the talkbackd daemon. Hold to talk, release to stop.
Author: Cueola

Actions.Name: Talk A (outs 1-2)
Actions.Tooltip: Hold to route the mic to output pair A (physical outs 1-2). Release to stop.

Actions.Name: Talk B (outs 3-4)
Actions.Tooltip: Hold to route the mic to output pair B (physical outs 3-4). Release to stop.
